title: Judge pauses the controversial Paramount-Warner Bros. merger for two weeks - Engadget
summary: A federal judge has temporarily paused the controversial merger between Paramount and Warner Bros., according to a report by The New York Times . Paramount gobbling up Warner Bros. means that one company would control a whole lot of media properties.
